name: Potato Lattice for Stews and Potpies (Uses Po
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the salt and pepper with the potato puree.
2. Fill a pastry bag with the mixture.
3. Pipe onto the top of the potpie or stew in serving bowls.
4. Makes 4 servings. Each serving equals 79 calories, 2g protein, 0g fat, 0mg cholesterol, 18g carbohydrates.
